query:
-- 创建演示用户
INSERT INTO users (id, openId, name, email, loginMethod, role, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn)
VALUES (1, 'demo-user-001', '演示用户', 'demo@meritgame.local', 'demo', 'user', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  name = '演示用户',
  email = 'demo@meritgame.local',
  updatedAt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

-- 创建今天的健康数据记录
INSERT INTO daily_health_data (userId, date, steps, energyBurned, sleepHours, walkingDistance, swimmingDistance, cyclingDistance, runningDistance, standingHours, mindfulnessMinutes, sunExposureMinutes, handwashCount, stairsClimbed, maxHeartRate, avgHeartRate, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (1, CURDATE(), 8500, 450, 7.5, 5.2, 0, 0, 3.1, 4, 15, 30, 8, 25, 120, 75, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  steps = 8500,
  energyBurned = 450,
  sleepHours = 7.5,
  walkingDistance = 5.2,
  runningDistance = 3.1,
  standingHours = 4,
  mindfulnessMinutes = 15,
  sunExposureMinutes = 30,
  handwashCount = 8,
  stairsClimbed = 25,
  maxHeartRate = 120,
  avgHeartRate = 75,
  updatedAt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

-- 创建今天的功德记录
INSERT INTO daily_merit_record (userId, date, baseMerit, bonusMerit, totalEarned, heartRateDeduction, lazinessDeduction, totalDeducted, netMerit, deductionReasons, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (1, CURDATE(), 500, 150, 650, 0, 0, 0, 650, JSON_ARRAY(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  baseMerit = 500,
  bonusMerit = 150,
  totalEarned = 650,
  heartRateDeduction = 0,
  lazinessDeduction = 0,
  totalDeducted = 0,
  netMerit = 650,
  deductionReasons = JSON_ARRAY(),
  updatedAt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
